entry.title: to have and to hold from this day forward
entry.summary:
Author: cookiesandcream

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,081Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 211

Summary: Buck hated Eddie Diaz. Actually—scratch that— he loathed Eddie Diaz. The man had been nothing short of insufferable since he met him. Every morning, Buck got up and dreaded seeing the man. He made Buck despise every minute he was in his presence. It wasn't just his smug smirk or that slight Texan drawl that grated on Buck's very nerves—it was everything. He waltzed into Buck's life on September 21st last year, hired as a new writer at the magazine where he worked. From day one, Diaz had been a know-it-all, constantly correcting Buck on every minor thing: You need a comma there. Write more. Write less. You spelled that wrong. To say it drove Buck crazy was an understatement. or the one where Buck and Eddie work together and don't get along but they wake up after having a free night of drinking to…wedding rings, a marriage certificate, and a handful of regret.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I Will Cross Universes for You
entry.summary:
Author: NyotaGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,584Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 24

Summary: "He wasn't me. How..." Buck's voice cracks, and the sound cuts through Eddie like a knife. "...how could you not see that?" And the tears finally fall, and all Eddie wants is to wrap him in his arms and hold him until they melt into one, until he can ease some of Buck's pain. Pain that he caused. He can only hang how head in shame, ignoring the way his own heart breaks because he should have known better. He should have... OR Buck has an evil doppelganger OR In which Buck's evil 'twin' kidnaps Buck and takes his place and Eddie and the rest of the 118 are none the wiser. In their defense, how could they have known that alternate universes existed?

entry.title: I love you, I'm sorry
entry.summary:
Author: DAFT_03

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,943Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Set in the aftermath of 'Mother’s Boy' - a re-imagination of Buck’s storyline in episodes ‘DIY’ and ‘Pick Your Poison’ based on fan theories I heard on TikTok before the episodes came out. Bobby is unfortunately dead but for the sole purpose of giving Buck more pain and trauma as clearly Tim Minear hates him. This is what Buck's drug addiction storyline could have been if it didn't have to be watered down for TV. Didn't hate how they did the story just heard loads of really good theories on TikTok before the episodes came out which made them feel slightly underwhelming. Basically Buck accidentally OD's at home one evening and makes the worst choices he possibly could to help the situation and has no one.

entry.title: G with an O, O with a D, T with an I and an M and an E and a good time
entry.summary:
Author: chucks_prophet

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,149Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

Summary: “My friend was just—”“We were just leaving.”Buck shifts his focus again to Eddie, who looks almost… angry? Although, with the way his pupils are consuming most of his irises, maybe possessed would be the better word. Either way, Buck smiles apologetically as he’s practically being shoved out the door.

entry.title: Unexpected visitors
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,039Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 36

Summary: “Well one of her old friends still lives in Hershey and you know, they talked and Maddie mentioned the pregnancy-““Still perfectly normal.”“And her friend ran into your parents at the store and told them about the pregnancy.”Buck froze.“And I mean you know, you know Maddie hasn’t spoken to them since she found out about… you know.”“The Jakeman thing.”“Yeah, yeah the Jakeman thing. She blocked their number. And even before that she didn’t ever talk to them about you really I mean- she never even told them about Rina or your leg or anything she- she’s totally been respecting your right to not want them in your life-““Chim. What exactly happened this morning?”“They must have used a new number to try and call Maddie because they got through.”“… Okay. Okay so my parents called. That’s… not great but-““They called to tell us that they’re in LA.”“They-“ Buck blinked once. Twice.He swallowed hard.“They’re in LA?” ...In which the Buckley parents come to town. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: A Lesson in Gaslighting
entry.summary:
Author: MultiFandomElla

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,733Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 77

Summary: Buck: Were you aware that everyone has a gc without us?Eddie: Must be real silent without you on there. Is that really what you needed to talk to me about?Buck: Eddie. Its a gc where they talk about us.Eddie: How did you find out about this?Buck: …Eddie: Buck Buckley.Buck: Oh shit. Full name. or Buddie find out that everyone is betting on when they will get together, so they decide to have their own fun.

entry.summary:
Author: aastranova

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,790Chapters: 14/30Kudos: 723

Summary: Post-lawsuit, Buck fights to reclaim his place at the 118. But the team he came back for doesn’t quite feel like home anymore, and the distance between him and Eddie keeps widening. Buck feels himself slowly disappearing - first from the team, then from himself. He's always been good at saving other people. He's never been good at saving himself. Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.title: Unbroken
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,651Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Evan Buckley was supposed to be a medical miracle. But when his job was done, when his brother survived, his parents discarded him, leaving Evan bouncing through the foster system. Years later, he thought he found his home, the love of his life in Liam Parks, only to realize he had traded one nightmare for another, this time suffering with isolation and abuse. Now, Evan is Buck. He works for the LAFD, and a single father fiercely protecting his daughter, Mila. He has strict rules to keep them safe, keep your head down, don't get attached, and never let the past catch up. But then Mila's best friend from school turns out to be Christopher Diaz. Suddenly, Buck is pulled into the loud, fiercely loyal orbit of the 118, his dangerously attractive coworker Eddie, and a found family he never thought he was allowed to have. Just as the walls start to come down, and Buck started to feel safe. Buck past starts catching up to him. Or, Buck had a rough childhood, and an even worse marriage full of abuse. He runs to Los Angeles with his daughter and he finds his place in the 118, and falls for his partner Eddie. He meets new people on the way that show him what love really is.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: it all breaks down, it always does (it all works out, it always does)
entry.summary:
Author: Elgney

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,195Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 580

Summary: “I have no idea what’s going on.” He was embarrassed at the whiny note in his voice, but he couldn’t swallow it away. “I mean, the last thing I remember, I was telling my parents that I was leaving Texas. And then all of the sudden I wake up and it’s like—” Like some stranger named Buck had infiltrated every corner of his life. That’s what it felt like. —— Amnesiac Eddie tries really hard to hate Buck. It doesn’t stick.

entry.title: only fools are satisfied
entry.summary:
Author: windmillsofmymind

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,447Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 30

Summary: “I think maybe Pepa's setting you up with the wrong people,” Buck blurts out. “I did like him, he just–” “I mean–” Buck huffs, and then he really gets going, “he’s basically just some–some emotionally unavailable douche who dragged you all the way out to Studio City fully intending to ditch you until he realized he had a chance to get in your pants, which–where, in some restroom? And don’t even get me started on–like, you said you sucked his dick, but what about you? Did he even get you off? That doesn’t sound very considerate! Frankly, he sounds like a terrible guy, and you should let me set you up with someone!” Eddie’s brain isn’t going remotely as fast as Buck’s, because he’s still slowly making his way from his first thought (did I ever tell him I was meeting Matt in Studio City?) to his second one (has he been thinking about if and how I got off this whole time?) when Buck says that last part, and then it takes another moment to sink in. He blinks at the table. He blinks at Buck. “I’m sorry, what was that?”Or: Eddie comes out, Pepa takes the initiative, and Buck follows her lead.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

Author: Elgcarres

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 116,507Chapters: 51/?Kudos: 212

Eddie ruined his name because only Eddie could use his name properly.And he still uses it… properly.***It started as a fix-it story for 'Lab Rats'. It doesn't go well *** What if there's Eddie in the lab What if it's him who dies instead of Bobby. Kinda.

entry.title: Fault Lines
entry.summary:
Author: themrscevans

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,113Chapters: 19/19Kudos: 42

Summary: Ava Rousseau never meant to fall for one firefighter — let alone two. What begins as reluctant friendship deepens into something raw and unshakable: love in the wreckage, trust forged in fire. But fault lines don’t ask permission before they break, and between ER chaos, unspoken confessions, and scars that refuse to fade, Ava learns the fiercest battles aren’t fought in the field — they’re fought inside your own chest.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: S6 Superwoman: Last Responder
entry.summary:
Author: That_bitch_without_a_life

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,575Chapters: 3/13Kudos: 18

Summary: For the past few months everything has been hectic and a little off balance. For some reason Bobby keeps putting her in different shift groups. It’s nice to be working with Ravi again now that he’s finished his probation and moved back to B-shift, but something is clearly up. With the return of the rest of the 118 things are starting to look up for Kara, but more importantly, new opportunity. TLDR: this is a female buck fic if she was supergirl, just trust the process.

entry.title: you got me (looking in the mirror for ghosts)
entry.summary:
Author: thisismyuniverse

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,254Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 317

Summary: After coming to terms with his feelings for Buck, Eddie’s libido is out of control. He gets tired of his hand and orders a toy that he doesn’t know is connected to the object of his desire. Meanwhile Buck is getting fucked within an inch of his life, bewildered but along for the ride.
